name: Best Cookie Ever
recipeInstructions: Cream together the butter and both sugars. Add the eggs and vanilla, mixing well. Stir in the flour, blended oatmeal, salt, baking powder, and baking soda. Fold in the chocolate chips, grated Hershey bar, and chopped nuts. Roll into balls about two inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet. Bake at 375°F for 10 minutes. Makes approximately 112 cookies (the batch can be halved).
